2606.24530.title: NatureBench: Can Coding Agents Match the Published SOTA of Nature-Family Papers?
2606.24530.paper_summary: We introduce NatureBench, a cross-discipline benchmark of 90 tasks distilled from peer-reviewed Nature-family publications, designed to evaluate whether AI coding agents can move beyond reproduction toward discovery on real scientific problems. NatureBench is built on NatureGym, an automated pipeline that constructs a standardized, per-task containerized environment from a source paper, addressing the environment-fragmentation problem that has limited the credibility of prior agent-on-research benchmarks. Evaluating ten frontier agent configurations under a strict web-search-disabled protocol, we find that the strongest model surpasses SOTA on only 17.8% of tasks under the g>0.1 criterion. Analysis of method pathways reveals that agents succeed primarily through methodological translation, converting scientific tasks into familiar supervised prediction problems, rather than through genuine scientific invention. Failures are dominated by wrong method choice and insufficient compute budget, not by task misunderstanding. We release the benchmark, the NatureGym pipeline, and a public leaderboard with maintainer-side reproduction. Code: https://github.com/FrontisAI/NatureBench
2606.24530.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹 NatureBench，這是一個跨學科的基準，包含從經過同行評審的 Nature 系列出版物中提煉出的 90 個任務，旨在評估 AI 編碼代理是否能夠超越重複，朝向在真實科學問題上的發現。 NatureBench 建立在 NatureGym 之上，這是一個自動化流程，從來源論文構建標準化的每個任務容器化環境，解決了環境碎片化問題，這限制了先前研究基準的可信度。在一個嚴格的禁用網絡搜索的協議下評估十個前沿代理配置，我們發現最強的模型僅在 g>0.1 標準下超越了 17.8% 的任務。方法路徑的分析顯示，代理主要通過方法論轉換成功，將科學任務轉化為熟悉的監督預測問題，而不是通過真正的科學發明。失敗主要是由於錯誤的方法選擇和不足的計算預算，而不是任務誤解。我們發布了基準、NatureGym 流程以及一個帶有維護者端重現的公共排行榜。代碼：https://github.com/FrontisAI/NatureBench
2606.24530.author: Yuru Wang et.al.
2606.24530.authors: Yuru Wang, Lejun Cheng, Yuxin Zuo, Sihang Zeng, Bingxiang He, Che Jiang, Junlin Yang, Yuchong Wang, Kaikai Zhao, Weifeng Huang, Kai Tian, Zhenzhao Yuan, Jincheng Zhong, Weizhi Wang, Ning Ding, Bowen Zhou, Kaiyan Zhang
